name: The First Kindler
title: Struck the first match that never went out

abilities.name: Ignite Creation
abilities.text: Deal 150. All your cards gain +40 HP for the game.

abilities.name: Eternal Flame
abilities.text: Deal 240. If this card would be KO'd next turn, it survives with 1 HP instead.

flavor_text: Before the red guild had a name, she had a spark.
